whatItDoes.bullet5: Browse guides on model routing, API vs subscription, and more

overpay.label: Why people overpay
overpay.title: Three patterns that add up fast

0.title: The subscription trap
0.problem: You pay $20/month for ChatGPT Plus but use it lightly. At your actual usage, the API costs $2.
0.fix: Switch to GPT-4o mini via API. Same quality, 90% less cost.
0.metricLabel: average wasted on unused subscription capacity

1.title: Using GPT-4o for everything
1.problem: GPT-4o costs 33× more per token than GPT-4o mini. Most tasks don't need that power.
1.fix: Route simple tasks to mini. Reserve GPT-4o for complex reasoning only.
1.metricLabel: of API spend eliminated by model routing with no quality change

2.title: No routing strategy
2.problem: One model for every task means paying premium prices across the board.
2.fix: Classify tasks first. Use Flash or mini for bulk, escalate to Sonnet only when needed.
2.metricLabel: cost reduction with a two-tier routing strategy

bestOverall.label: Best overall
bestOverall.pitch: Near-GPT-4o quality at a fraction of the cost. The safest default upgrade path for most teams.

cheapestViable.label: Cheapest viable
cheapestViable.pitch: 33× cheaper than GPT-4o. Handles classification, Q&A, and summaries without compromise.

startupOption.label: Startup option
startupOption.pitch: Near-zero cost for high-volume pipelines. Good enough for lean teams early on.

bestForCoding.label: Best for coding
bestForCoding.pitch: Strong code generation and reasoning. Handles complex refactors better than cheaper models.

pricingData.label: Pricing data
pricingData.title: Pricing you can trust
pricingData.desc: All pricing data is sourced from official provider pages and reviewed regularly. When prices change, we log the diff so you can see what changed and when.
pricingData.changelog: What changed in our last review →

bottomCta.title: Find out what you're actually paying.
bottomCta.desc: Enter your monthly token usage and see the real cost — and exactly how much you'd save by switching models.

calc.bullet1: You're paying for GPT-4o, Claude, or a subscription and want a cheaper equivalent.
calc.bullet2: You need a fast estimate before choosing between API and subscription plans.
calc.bullet3: You want one clear next step after seeing your projected monthly spend.
calc.recommendations: Recommendations are based on use case, usage level, and cost sensitivity.
calc.howDesc1: API costs are calculated as: (input tokens / 1000 × input cost per 1K) + (output tokens / 1000 × output cost per 1K). Subscription costs are flat monthly fees regardless of usage.
calc.howDesc2: 1 token ≈ 0.75 words ≈ 4 characters of English text.
